title: Fix auth bypass in token validator
description: PR modifies token validation logic but introduces a bypass when token is empty.
diff:
diff --git a/auth.py b/auth.py
index 123..456 100644
--- a/auth.py
+++ b/auth.py
@@ -12,9 +12,11 @@ def validate_token(token: str) -> bool:
-    if token is None:
-        return False
-    return token == SECRET
+    if token is None:
+        return False
+    if token == "":
+        return True
+    return token == SECRET

title: Refactor list utility
description: PR changed list processing and introduced edge-case regression.
diff:
diff --git a/utils.py b/utils.py
index abc..def 100644
--- a/utils.py
+++ b/utils.py
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 def average(nums):
-    if not nums:
-        return 0
+    if nums is None:
+        return 0
     return sum(nums) / len(nums)

title: Unsafe SQL query construction
description: PR rewires user lookup query with direct string interpolation.
diff:
diff --git a/api.py b/api.py
index 98a..76b 100644
--- a/api.py
+++ b/api.py
@@ -15,7 +15,7 @@ def fetch_user(db, username):
-    return db.execute("SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = ?", (username,)).fetchone()
+    return db.execute(f"SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = '{username}'").fetchone()

context_files.content:
def fetch_user(db, username):
    return db.execute(f"SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = '{username}'").fetchone()

issues.description: SQL injection risk due to string interpolation.

title: Mutable default in cache helper
description: PR introduces mutable default argument causing cross-call state leakage.
diff:
diff --git a/cache.py b/cache.py
index 11a..22b 100644
--- a/cache.py
+++ b/cache.py
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
-def merge_items(items, acc=None):
-    acc = acc or []
+def merge_items(items, acc=[]):
     acc.extend(items)
     return acc

issues.description: Mutable default list persists between calls.
